known_sims.tooltip: QManager remembers the SIMs it has seen, so it only alerts you when a genuinely new SIM is inserted. Clearing forgets every SIM except the one currently inserted.
known_sims.clear_dialog_description: This forgets every SIM QManager has seen, except the one currently inserted — so your active SIM won't be flagged as new. Previously-used SIMs will alert again the next time they are inserted.
